{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Iron Legion staff
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion staff]] is a long, crimson staff with a red-stained eye on the end.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
